---
title: ""
toc: false
listing:
  id: listing-recent
  contents: blog/posts
  type: default
  max-items: 3
  sort: "date desc"
  fields: [date, title, description]
---

::: {.hero}
# A. Naya

::: {.lead}
Environmental Data Science · Remote Sensing · Interactive Apps
:::
:::

Researcher focused on remote sensing, GIS, and forest ecosystems.
I build reproducible analyses and tools that make ecological processes visible —
from LiDAR data processing to interactive Shiny apps.

[R]{.badge-skill}
[Python]{.badge-skill}
[QGIS / PyQGIS]{.badge-skill}
[Quarto]{.badge-skill}
[Shiny]{.badge-skill}
[Geospatial]{.badge-skill}
[Data Visualization]{.badge-skill}

[View Projects](projects/index.qmd){.btn .btn-primary .mt-2}
[About me](about.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .mt-2}

## Latest Posts

::: {#listing-recent}
:::

[All posts →](blog/index.qmd)
